records.question: Which buildings named One Tampa City Center have at most 39 floors, are at least 537 feet tall, and are associated with institutions that were founded no later than 1927, have at most 616 students, and whose team is exactly Warriors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.floors <= 39 AND institution.enrollment <= 616 AND building.name = 'One Tampa City Center' AND institution.founded <= 1927.0 AND institution.team = 'Warriors' AND building.height_feet >= 537
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.building_id
FROM building b
JOIN Institution i ON b.building_id = i.building_id
WHERE b.Name = 'One Tampa City Center'
AND b.Floors <= 39
AND b.Height_feet >= 537
AND i.Founded <= 1927
AND i.Enrollment <= 616
AND i.Team = 'Warriors'

records.question: Which buildings have at least 22 floors but are no more than 280 feet tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.height_feet <= 280 AND building.floors >= 22
records.pred_sql: SELECT building_id FROM building WHERE Floors >= 22 AND Height_feet <= 280

records.question: Which buildings named Park Tower are located at 400 North Tampa Street and belong to private institutions in the CalPac conference that were founded in 1927 or later with enrollment of at most 650?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.street_address = '400 North Tampa Street' AND institution.type = 'Private' AND institution.enrollment <= 650 AND building.name = 'Park Tower' AND institution.primary_conference = 'CalPac' AND institution.founded >= 1927.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.building_id
FROM building b
JOIN Institution i ON b.building_id = i.building_id
WHERE b.Name = 'Park Tower'
AND b.Street_address = '400 North Tampa Street'
AND i.Type = 'Private'
AND i.Primary_Conference = 'CalPac'
AND i.Founded >= 1927
AND i.Enrollment <= 650
